headline: Quarterly Report Investor Webinar
summary: Perth, Western Australia, April 10, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- QUARTERLY REPORT INVESTOR WEBINAR / CALL Perseus Mining Limited (ASX/TSX: PRU) is hosting an investor webinar and conference call to discuss its March 2026 Quarterly Results, which are anticipated for release around 8:30am AEST on Thursday, 23 April 2026. CALL DETAILS Australia: Thursday 23 April 2026Perth – 7:00amSydney/Melbourne – 9:00amCanada: Wednesday 22 April 2026Vancouver – 4:00pm Toronto – 7:00pmUK: Thursday 23 April 2026London
